title: Payphone
why_this_song: Payphone by Maroon 5 (2012) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Where are the plans we made for two?
Yeah, I, I know it's hard to remember
I would still be holding you like this
All those fairy tales are full of shit
One more fucking love song, I'll be sick, oh

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "payphone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "payphone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm at a payphone trying to call home
All of my change I spent on you

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Payphone" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Payphone"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Maroon 5 one question about "Payphone", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Maroon 5 sobre "Payphone", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Payphone" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Payphone" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Payphone", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Payphone", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Payphone" was released in 2012. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Payphone" foi lançada em 2012. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.
